action.openDataDir: Open log file directory in file manager

error.tokenExpired: Access token expired, please obtain a new one

qrz.uploadDesc: Upload local QSOs to QRZ.com Logbook

lotw.uploadDesc: Sign and upload via local TQSL tool to LoTW

editQso.title: Edit QSO Record
editQso.editWarning: Modifying QSO records may affect the accuracy of statistics. Please proceed with caution.

deleteQso.title: Delete QSO Record
deleteQso.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the QSO with {{callsign}}?
deleteQso.warning: This action cannot be undone. The record will be permanently deleted.

logbookSyncSettings.title: Logbook Sync
logbookSyncSettings.description: Configure sync settings for various amateur radio logging services
logbookSyncSettings.wavelogDesc: Open-source amateur radio logging system with bidirectional sync, real-time upload and batch download
logbookSyncSettings.qrzDesc: Global amateur radio operator database for contact information lookup and verification
logbookSyncSettings.lotwDesc: ARRL official QSL confirmation system for award applications and contact verification
logbookSyncSettings.wavelogTabDesc: Amateur radio logging service with bidirectional sync

lotwSettings.title: LoTW Sync Settings
lotwSettings.description: ARRL Logbook of The World QSL confirmation system
lotwSettings.fillUsernamePassword: Please fill in username and password first
lotwSettings.verifySuccess: Account verified, you can download QSL confirmations
lotwSettings.tqslInfo: Uploading to LoTW requires digitally signing the log with ARRL's TQSL tool. Please install TQSL and complete certificate configuration first.
lotwSettings.stationLocationDesc: Select the station location configured in TQSL
lotwSettings.tqslNotFound: TQSL not detected, please install TQSL or specify the path manually
lotwSettings.autoUploadDesc: Automatically sign and upload to LoTW via TQSL after each QSO
lotwSettings.manualOpsInfo: For manual operations, go to the "Logbook" page:
lotwSettings.manualUpload: "Upload to LoTW" — sign and upload via TQSL
lotwSettings.usage1: LoTW is ARRL's official QSL confirmation system
lotwSettings.usage2: Downloading confirmations only requires your LoTW account password
lotwSettings.usage3: Uploading logs requires TQSL installed and digital certificate configured
lotwSettings.usage4: TQSL certificate must be applied for and activated on the ARRL website
lotwSettings.usage5: First-time users should complete station location setup in TQSL

qrzSettings.title: QRZ.com Logbook Sync Settings
qrzSettings.description: Sync your logbook with QRZ.com Logbook
qrzSettings.apiKeyDesc: Get API Key from QRZ.com → My Logbook → Settings
qrzSettings.fillApiKey: Please fill in API Key first
qrzSettings.autoUploadDesc: Automatically upload to QRZ.com Logbook after each successful QSO
qrzSettings.downloadSyncDesc: For download and manual sync, please use the Logbook page.
qrzSettings.usage1: QRZ.com Logbook API requires XML Logbook Data subscription

wavelogSettings.title: WaveLog Sync Settings
wavelogSettings.description: Configure connection and sync options for WaveLog server
wavelogSettings.solution1: Check if WaveLog server is running
wavelogSettings.solution2: Verify URL format is correct (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8086)
wavelogSettings.solution3: Check network connection and firewall settings
wavelogSettings.solution4: Try accessing the WaveLog URL directly in a browser
wavelogSettings.networkSolution1: Check if network connection is stable
wavelogSettings.networkSolution2: Verify WaveLog server is responding normally
wavelogSettings.networkSolution3: Check if firewall is blocking the connection
wavelogSettings.urlSolution3: If using IP address, verify the IP is correct
wavelogSettings.urlDesc: Full WaveLog server address including protocol (https://)
wavelogSettings.apiKeyDesc: Generate in WaveLog right menu → API Keys
wavelogSettings.fillUrlApiKey: Please fill in WaveLog URL and API key first
wavelogSettings.stationDesc: Select the Station configuration created in WaveLog
wavelogSettings.radioNameDesc: Radio device name displayed in WaveLog
wavelogSettings.autoUploadDesc: Automatically upload to WaveLog server after each successful QSO
wavelogSettings.downloadSyncDesc: Auto download sync is not available. Please use the manual sync button on the Logbook page to download and sync QSO records from WaveLog.
wavelogSettings.usage1: WaveLog server must have HTTPS enabled to use this feature
wavelogSettings.usage2: View Station ID in WaveLog's Station Locations
wavelogSettings.usage3: Generate API key in WaveLog's API Keys
wavelogSettings.usage4: Uploaded QSO data uses ADIF format
wavelogSettings.usage5: For download sync, use the manual sync button on the Logbook page

logbookPage.paramErrorDesc: Sorry, unable to open the logbook page. Missing required operator ID parameter. Please reopen from the operator panel on the main interface.
logbookPage.hint: Tip: Click the logbook button in the main interface operator panel to correctly open the logbook
